bravebird.description: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

breakingswipe.shortDescription: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Attack by 1.
breakingswipe.description: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

brickbreak.shortDescription: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.
brickbreak.description: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated.

brine.shortDescription: Power doubles if the target's HP is 50% or less.
brine.description: Power doubles if the target has less than or equal to half of its maximum HP remaining.

brutalswing.shortDescription: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.
